about.en: NEAR is a sharded proof-of-stake blockchain focused on usability and scalability. NEAR is used for fees and staking.
about.es: NEAR es una blockchain de prueba de participación (proof-of-stake) con sharding centrada en usabilidad y escalabilidad. NEAR se usa para comisiones y staking (staking).
about.ca: NEAR és una blockchain de prova de participació (proof-of-stake) amb sharding centrada en usabilitat i escalabilitat. NEAR s'utilitza per a comissions i staking (staking).
